name: simple-asana-ui
description: Asana dashboard on Cloudflare Pages with OAuth (see BUILD_SPEC.md)

scripts.dev: vite build && concurrently -k -n vite,pages -c blue,magenta "vite build --watch" "wrangler pages dev public --live-reload --compatibility-date=2026-07-14"
scripts.build: vite build && wrangler pages functions build --outdir=dist
